shadow_event.query: 需要； 我希望是直接在这个窗口来测试，可以么？

transcript.content: 新的对话，也还是在umc项目里， 为什么context数据不对；
现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

不是“每一轮都会压缩”，但现在看起来已经是“每一轮都会评估，满足条件就正常 GC 应用”。 这轮之所以没压，是因为这是新对话，抽出来的 turn 不够。代码里 `minTurns` 默认是 `3`，少于 3 就直接 `not_enough_turns`，见 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/cod…
那接下来 我要怎么测试 gc 在正常工作，并且明显做了选择，至少一个连续对话里，应该能够控制好 context的大小；或者换了换题之后 context应该减小； 你需要帮我设计一下案例；
可以，建议你分成两层测：`VS Code 手工验收` + `仓库脚本回放`。这样能同时回答两件事：一是“真实使用时 context 会不会被控制住”，二是“GC 的选择是不是符合设计”。 **先看什么** 每次都盯这几个信号就够了：
需要； 我希望是直接在这个窗口来测试，可以么？
可以，直接在这个窗口测。 我已经加了手工验收文档：[codex-context-minor-gc-manual.zh-CN.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/docs/reference/unified-memory-core/testing/codex-context-minor-gc-manual.zh-CN.md)，并挂到了…

decision.archive_summary: Earlier block established why GC did not trigger in a fresh conversation: the assistant explained that GC is evaluated each turn but only applies when conditions are met, and in this case the conversation had fewer than the default minTurns=3, so it returned not_enough_turns. The active topic then shifted to designing and running an in-window/manual GC test for this same UMC project conversation.
decision.reasoning_summary: The conversation is still on the same active topic: testing Codex context minor GC behavior in this window, so relation=continue. Keep t4-t7 raw because the latest exchange depends on the unresolved testing/design thread and the assistant’s commitment that this window can be used. t1-t2 are superseded setup questions and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. Preserve t3 as a compact pin because its minTurns=3 / new-chat not_enough_turns explanation may still matter while interpreting upcoming test results, but it does not need to stay raw.
